title: Cheesy Rye Supper
description: A simple, comforting supper made with rye bread, cheese, and a hint of peppery flavor. This dish is perfect for a cozy evening in.
instructions: Cut the rye bread into 1-inch cubes and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with a little bit of water and sprinkle with salt and ground peppercorns.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy.
While the bread is baking, melt the cheddar cheese in a saucepan over low heat.
Once the bread is crispy, remove it from the oven and top with the melted cheese.
Return the bread to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the supper from the oven and top with sliced Dutch cheese, if using.
